title: Public Notice Summary for Harbor East Permit Renewal
public_summary: Summarizes the published notice period, posting locations, and response deadline for the Harbor East stormwater permit renewal.

title: Permit Application Digest
public_summary: Condenses the applicant, facility location, receiving-water segment, and requested renewal scope from the Harbor East application.

title: Sampling Results Table Narrative
public_summary: Summarizes public sampling results for turbidity, total suspended solids, oil sheen observations, and pH across the renewal period.

title: Community Meeting Minutes
public_summary: Records public questions about access-road runoff, pump-station maintenance, and the expected comment response timeline.

title: Field Inspection Checklist
public_summary: Summarizes the public inspection checklist for inlet condition, signage, storage cover, and sweep-log availability.

title: Public Comment Log
public_summary: Lists the public comments received during the Harbor East notice window and groups them by topic.

title: Response Commitments
public_summary: Records two public response commitments: revised HE-OUT-2 diagram and post-storm sweeping summary.

title: Final Packet Cover
public_summary: Provides the public packet label, matter code, records coordinator, and assembly date for the Harbor East renewal packet.
